final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input d,
    output reg q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk, negedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (~rst) begin
        q <= 1;
    end else begin
        q <= ~d;
    end
end

endmodule
